description_long: This is a yellow, freestanding caution sign with a rectangular shape and a foldable A-frame design. The front face prominently displays a 'No Smoking' symbol above a bold 'OUT OF ORDER' warning, both set within bordered panels. The surface shows some signs of dirt and wear, suggesting it is used in public or high-traffic areas. The sign is constructed from molded plastic, with visible hinges at the top for folding and easy transport. The rear face is similar but lacks the 'OUT OF ORDER' text, only showing the 'No Smoking' symbol. The side views reveal the thin, angled profile and the hollow interior, typical of lightweight, portable caution signs.
description: A yellow, foldable plastic caution sign with 'OUT OF ORDER' and a 'No Smoking' symbol, designed for high visibility in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'No Smoking' symbol and 'OUT OF ORDER' text on a yellow background with some surface dirt.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin, A-frame profile and hollow interior, with no visible text or symbols.
description_view_2: Rear view with the 'No Smoking' symbol but no 'OUT OF ORDER' text, otherwise similar to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin, angled A-frame profile and hollow structure.
attribute_symbol: No Smoking symbol, 'OUT OF ORDER' text
attribute_placement_location: sidewalk, building entrance, restroom, or other public indoor/outdoor area
